# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "serverName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Azure SQL logical server."
      }
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The administrator login name for the SQL server."
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The administrator login password for the SQL server."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for all resources."
      }
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Azure SQL Database."
      }
    },
    "collation": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database collation."
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SKU name for the database."
      }
    },
    "maxSizeBytes": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2147483648",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Maximum database size in bytes."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {},
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('serverName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
          "name": "AllowAzureServices",
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
            "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "databases",
          "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
          "name": "[parameters('databaseName')]",
          "location": "[parameters('location')]",
          "properties": {
            "collation": "[parameters('collation')]",
            "maxSizeBytes": "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]",
            "sampleName": ""
          },
          "sku": {
            "name": "[parameters('skuName')]",
            "tier": "Basic",
            "capacity": 5
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('serverName')]"
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('databaseName')]"
    }
  }
}
